    • Uses of FeatureRequest in fr.maif

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      CompletableFuture<Map<String,​Boolean>> IzanamiClient.checkFeatureActivations​(FeatureRequest request)
      Deprecated.
      use checkFeatureValues instead
      CompletableFuture<IzanamiResult> IzanamiClient.featureValues​(FeatureRequest request)
      Return multiple feature values.

    • Uses of FeatureRequest in fr.maif.requests

      Methods in fr.maif.requests that return FeatureRequest 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      FeatureRequest FeatureRequest.clearFeatures()
      Remove all features for this request, usefull after cpoying a query, to keep parameters but change features

      Whether this request should ignore cache

      Create a new multi feature request

      Add provided features for this request
